purpose: T3: implement operating-point convergence gate for Salt Q-perturbation runs. Resolves TODO-PERT-REQUAL.
scope: All 16 Salt Jin Q-perturbation and control runs across June 19/25 campaigns.
headline_result: All 14 genuine Q-perturbation runs are FALSE_STEADY (mdot moved <0.3% vs 1.6-3.5% expected). None usable for upcomer correlation.
